target_user: Sales reps, recruiters, and operators repeatedly entering the same contact details into web forms.
one_sentence_value: Save one local profile and fill visible lead form fields on the current page in one click.
pricing_positioning: Current sandbox revision is free-only. Packaging should still look premium without inventing a paid tier.
trust_positioning: Professional single-purpose utility with real browser-smoke proof, minimal permissions, and literal privacy copy.
local_only_claim: Uses local Chrome storage and only acts on the active tab after a user click.
no_login_claim: No account, login, or workspace setup is required for the core flow.
no_upload_claim: Does not upload profile data or page content to a remote service.
pro_value_message: Keep the product feeling paid-quality now, and reserve any free-versus-Pro message until monetization is enabled truthfully.

visual_style.composition_direction: Quiet premium SaaS presentation with editorial spacing, restrained overlays, and real UI as the proof layer.
visual_style.screenshot_usage: Always start from a real browser-smoke screenshot and add one concise message only.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Core Value
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: What does this extension do in one sentence?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Keep first name, email, phone, country, and notes ready in the popup.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Real popup UI only. Do not show unsupported sync or team features.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Real Workflow
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: How fast is the core action?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Fill the current page in one click.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Run it from the popup only when you are on a real lead form.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Show a real form page and keep the claim to visible supported fields.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Clean Result
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: What result should I expect after using it?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Text, email, phone, textarea, and select fields match the saved profile.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Must stay tied to the actual browser-smoke scenario.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Smart Safeguards
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: What safeguards keep the fill action controlled?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Readonly and disabled fields are skipped. Existing values stay unchanged by default.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Do not imply background automation or unsupported overwrite rules.

screenshot_storyboard.title: Local Trust
screenshot_storyboard.user_question_answered: Why is this safer than a broader workflow tool?
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_headline: Local-only. No account. No cloud sync.
screenshot_storyboard.overlay_subcopy: Profile data stays in Chrome storage and runs only after a user click.
screenshot_storyboard.chrome_store_compliance_notes: Only use claims that match the real storage and network behavior.

promo_tile_concept: A branded value card with one cropped real screenshot, generous whitespace, and a single product promise.
marquee_concept: A wide premium layout that pairs the popup and filled-form result with calm trust language and no fake social proof.
landing_hero_concept: A refined hero that frames save, fill, and trust as one continuous local-only workflow.
short_video_concept: A 15-second flow from save, to fill, to clean result, ending on local-only and no-login trust copy.
store_listing_quality_goals: Store screenshots stay traceable to browser-smoke captures.
Promo assets feel premium without pretending to be the app itself.
Privacy and permission claims match the actual bundle and QA evidence.
Any future paid tier is disclosed clearly in both listing and UI.
blocked_claims: No upload if network verification would contradict the claim
next_step: Generate branded still assets from the storyboard and block publish until the premium asset quality gate passes.
